summary: Nils Langeland Helgeson was my great great great grandfather. He was born in Norway and made the significant journey to the United States in December 1880. His immigration marked the beginning of our family's story in America. I feel connected to him through the legacy he left behind.

Norway is where my great great great grandfather, Nils Langeland Helgeson, was born. It was from there that he decided to leave in December 1880 to seek new opportunities. Norway represents the roots of my family before they started their new life abroad. I think about the culture and environment he left behind when he immigrated.

The United States became home to my great great great grandfather, Nils Langeland Helgeson, after he immigrated here in December 1880. It was the place where he started a new chapter for our family. I see the U.S. as the land of opportunity that welcomed him and allowed our family to grow.
